nasb.text: So David gave orders to gather the foreigners who were in the land of Israel, and he set stonecutters to hew out stones to build the house of God.

esv.text: David commanded to gather together the resident aliens who were in the land of Israel, and he set stonecutters to prepare dressed stones for building the house of God.

cnv.text: 大衛預備了大量的鐵，做門扇上的釘子和鈎子；又預備了大量的銅，多得無法可稱；

ccb.text: 大卫下令召集住在以色列的外族人，派他们采凿建上帝殿用的石头。
